LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ORDERS: SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO THE FOURTH AND SEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. RULINGS ON EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED AS TO OBJECTIONS 1, 4, 10, 11 AND 12. OBJECTION 2 IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND ADMISSIBLE AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION. OBJECTION 5 IS GRANTED. OBJECTIONS 3, 6, 7, 8, 9 AND 13 ARE OVERRULED. MR. WHITE IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: MATTHEW N. WHITE, ESQUIRE (415.453.1010) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JAMES M. GOODMAN, ESQUIRE (HASSARD BONNINGTON, 415.288.9800) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ORDERS: SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO THE FOURTH AND SEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. RULINGS ON EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED AS TO OBJECTIONS 1, 4, 10, 11 AND 12. OBJECTION 2 IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND ADMISSIBLE AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION. OBJECTION 5 IS GRANTED. OBJECTIONS 3, 6, 7, 8, 9 AND 13 ARE OVERRULED. MR. WHITE IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
